name: Virtual Screening
description: Accelerate drug discovery with AFVS virtual screening and using QuickVina2. Select from public datasets like ZINC or upload your own ligands, define your binding site, and screen millions of compounds to identify promising hits.
capabilities: Accelerate drug discovery with AFVS virtual screening and using QuickVina2
Select from public datasets like ZINC or upload your own ligands, define your binding site, and screen millions of compounds to identify promising hits.

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

ligand_library.description: Custom ligand library in SDF format for screening

ligand_dataset.description: Public ligand dataset to screen against

center_x.description: X coordinate of the binding site center

center_y.description: Y coordinate of the binding site center

center_z.description: Z coordinate of the binding site center

size_x.description: Width of the binding box along X axis (Angstroms)

size_y.description: Width of the binding box along Y axis (Angstroms)

size_z.description: Width of the binding box along Z axis (Angstroms)
